ValidationRule.description: Ensures student role users can only edit applications that are in Draft status.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT(ISNEW()) && $UserRole.Name = 'Student' && NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Application_Status__c), 'Draft')) && ( ISCHANGED(First_Name__c) || ISCHANGED(Last_Name__c) || ISCHANGED(Email__c) || ISCHANGED(Phone__c) || ISCHANGED(Date_of_Birth__c) || ISCHANGED(Applied_Course__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can only edit applications that are in Draft status.
